zh.lifeSummary: 當Athelina Stratton Musters於1167年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴辛加姆時，她的父親Lord John of Bassingham de Musters27歲，母親Elizabeth Thornhill27歲。她於1191年與William de Staunton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1216年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Athelina Stratton Musters于1167年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴辛加姆时，她的父亲Lord John of Bassingham de Musters27岁，母亲Elizabeth Thornhill27岁。她于1191年与William de Staunton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1216年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Musters
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Les Moutiers-Hubert (Calvados).

variants.name: Muster
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Hans, Bernhard, Heinz.
German: occupational name for a producer or seller of ‘most’, unfermented grape juice, fruit wine, from Middle Low German must, most, Middle High German most (see Most ).
Germanized form of Sorbian Mostar (see Moster ), a cognate of 4 below.

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

en.lifeSummary: When Athelina Stratton Musters was born in 1167, in Bassingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord John of Bassingham de Musters, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Thornhill, was 27. She married William de Staunton in 1191, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1216, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Athelina Stratton Musters est née en 1167, à Bassingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord John of Bassingham de Musters, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Thornhill, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William de Staunton en 1191, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1216, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Sie starb 1216 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Athelina Stratton Mustersが1167年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバシンガムで生まれた時，父Lord John of Bassingham de Mustersは27歳，母Elizabeth Thornhillは27歳であった。1191年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンでWilliam de Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1216年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Athelina Stratton Musters(이)가 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배징함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John of Bassingham de Musters(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Thornhill(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1191년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 William de Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Athelina Stratton Musters родилась в 1167 г. в местности бассингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord John of Bassingham de Musters было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Thornhill, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Staunton в 1191 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1216 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
